warnings.message: outputs/refs are constrained but input value is never related to output value — there is no value-conservation check (e.g. codeScriptValueSum(in) == codeScriptValueSum(out), or inputs[i].value accounted against outputs[i].value), so value can leak or be minted while the destination pins still pass.
